title: Calcitonin Test: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
n a few minutes apart. If your calcitonin increases by a lot in each blood sample, it may mean you have C-cell hyperplasia or medullary thyroid carcinoma, but you'll need other tests to find out for sure.
